town_ita_shooter.description: Town ITA participant for the first Mafia Universe ITA vertical.

town_ita_sharpshooter.description: Town ITA participant with better ITA chance.

town_ita_bad_shot.description: Town ITA participant with worse ITA chance.

vanilla_town.description: Mafia Universe draft alias for a town-aligned vanilla participant.

blank_town_role.description: Mafia Universe blank town role placeholder with no active abilities.

blank_mafia_role.description: Mafia Universe blank mafia role placeholder with no active abilities.

lover.description: Mafia Universe Lover. Passive role bound to another lover by setup state; if either dies by any means, the linked partner dies too.

mafia_bomber.description: Mafia Universe Mafia Bomber. Hidden passive role: when killed at night, detonates against the killing actor.

town_bomber.description: Mafia Universe Town Bomber. Hidden passive role: when killed at night, detonates against the killing actor.

mason.description: Mafia Universe Mason. Town-aligned passive member of a confirmed private Mason chat.

neighbor.description: Mafia Universe Neighbor. Passive member of a private chat with no alignment confirmation.

town_treestump.description: Town-aligned Treestump. Remains in thread without a vote after elimination.

mafia_treestump.description: Mafia-aligned Treestump. Remains in thread without a vote after elimination.

mafia_goon.description: Mafia-aligned vanilla participant. May carry the ordinary factional night kill.

mafia_roleblocker.description: Mafia Roleblocker. Blocks the first matching roleblockable night action from the target.

mafia_jack_of_all_trades.description: Mafia Jack of All Trades. Carries one-shot parity investigate, protect, block, and track choices.

town_doctor.description: Town Doctor. Protects one slot from ordinary night kills.

town_bodyguard.description: Town Bodyguard. Protects one slot and dies intercepting a blocked kill.

mafia_doctor.description: Mafia Doctor. Protects one slot from ordinary night kills.

mafia_bodyguard.description: Mafia Bodyguard. Protects one slot and dies intercepting a blocked kill.

town_martyr.description: Town Martyr. Protects one slot and dies in the target's place through Martyr attribution.

town_cpr_doctor.description: Town CPR Doctor. Saves an attacked target and harms an unattacked target.

town_cop.description: Town Cop. Each night, investigates one slot and receives a town/scum parity result.

mafia_cop.description: Mafia Cop. Each night, investigates one slot and receives a town/scum parity result.

town_alignment_cop.description: Town Alignment Cop. Mafia Universe draft alias of a parity cop using the investigate action id.

mafia_alignment_cop.description: Mafia Alignment Cop. Mafia Universe draft alias of a parity cop using the investigate action id.

town_alignment_oracle.description: Town Alignment Oracle. Each night, marks one slot; if this Oracle later dies, the marked target's alignment is publicly revealed.

mafia_alignment_oracle.description: Mafia Alignment Oracle. Each night, marks one slot; if this Oracle later dies, the marked target's alignment is publicly revealed.

town_role_oracle.description: Town Role Oracle. Each night, marks one slot; if this Oracle later dies, the marked target's role is publicly revealed.

mafia_role_oracle.description: Mafia Role Oracle. Each night, marks one slot; if this Oracle later dies, the marked target's role is publicly revealed.

innocent_child.description: Innocent Child. May publicly reveal their town alignment during the day without revealing role.

town_parity_cop.description: Town Parity Cop. Each night, scans one slot and compares later scans against this investigator's prior parity baseline.

town_vanilla_cop.description: Town Vanilla Cop. Each night, checks whether one slot is vanilla.

town_neapolitan.description: Town Neapolitan. Each night, checks whether one slot is Vanilla Town.

town_gunsmith.description: Town Gunsmith. Each night, checks whether one slot has a gun-bearing role.

town_role_cop.description: Town Role Cop. Each night, learns one target's role key.

town_full_cop.description: Town Full Cop. Each night, learns one target's role key and alignment.

town_framer.description: Town Framer. Marks one target so a same-night parity investigation reads scum.

town_tracker.description: Town Tracker. Each night, follows one slot and learns which visible slots that target visited.

town_watcher.description: Town Watcher. Each night, watches one slot and learns which visible actors visited that target.

town_voyeur.description: Town Voyeur. Each night, watches one slot and learns which visible action ids targeted that slot.

town_motion_detector.description: Town Motion Detector. Each night, checks whether one slot visibly acted or was visibly visited.

town_bus_driver.description: Town Bus Driver. Each night, swaps two slots so actions aimed at either land on the other.

town_redirector.description: Town Redirector. Each night, retargets actions aimed at the first submitted slot to the second submitted slot.

town_empowerer.description: Town Empowerer. Each night, empowers one target so their same-night actions ignore blocks and redirects.

town_commuter.description: Town Commuter. Each night, self-commutes and becomes untargetable for the current resolution.

town_rolestopper.description: Town Rolestopper. Each night, makes one other slot untargetable for the current resolution.

miller.description: Miller. Town-aligned but reads as scum to parity investigations.

town_roleblocker.description: Town Roleblocker. Blocks the first matching roleblockable night action from the target.

town_jack_of_all_trades.description: Town Jack of All Trades. Carries one-shot parity investigate, protect, block, and track choices.

town_jailkeeper.description: Town Jailkeeper. Blocks and protects one target through the same night action.

mafia_jailkeeper.description: Mafia Jailkeeper. Blocks and protects one target through the same night action.

town_poisoner.description: Town Poisoner. Each night marks one slot as poisoned; unresolved poison kills on the next night unless cured.

town_poison_doctor.description: Town Poison Doctor. Each night cures one poisoned slot before pending poison death resolves.

town_healer.description: Town Healer. Mafia Universe alias of Poison Doctor: each night cures one poisoned slot before pending poison death resolves.

town_arsonist.description: Town Arsonist. Douses slots with a persistent mark, then ignites all slots doused before the current resolution.

town_firefighter.description: Town Firefighter. Each night extinguishes one doused slot before ignite reads carried douse marks.

town_firefighter_preempt.description: Town Firefighter Preempt. Mafia Universe alias of Firefighter with explicit ignite-preemption culture note: each night extinguishes one doused slot before ignite reads carried douse marks.

town_motivator.description: Town Motivator. Each night grants one target a private single-use extra action.

town_fruit_vendor.description: Town Fruit Vendor. Each night sends fruit as a private target notification with no persistent mechanical effect.

town_night_desperado.description: Town Night Desperado. Each night may attempt an ordinary non-factional kill; same-alignment targets trigger a self-kill failback.

town_vigilante.description: Town Vigilante. Each night may perform an ordinary non-factional kill.

town_janitor.description: Town Janitor. Each night may perform an ordinary non-factional kill whose death flip is concealed by the pack death_reveal policy.

town_universal_backup.description: Town Universal Backup. Chooses one source target and inherits that target's role if the source later dies.

town_day_vigilante.description: Town Day Vigilante. Each day may perform an ordinary non-factional kill before the vote outcome is resolved.

town_day_desperado.description: Town Day Desperado. Each day may shoot one target before the vote outcome; a non-mafia target causes the Desperado to die instead.

town_ninja.description: Town Ninja. Each night may perform an ordinary non-factional kill hidden from graph-derived visit results.

town_power_role_killer.description: Town Power Role Killer. Each night may kill only a target whose role is outside the pack's vanilla role set.

town_inventor.description: Town Inventor. Each night chooses one private item to grant to a target.

town_strongman.description: Town Strongman. Carries a night kill that bypasses ordinary protection.

mafia_strongman.description: Mafia Strongman. Carries a factional kill that bypasses ordinary protection.

godfather.description: Mafia Godfather. Carries the factional kill and reads as town to parity investigations.

mafia_parity_cop.description: Mafia Parity Cop. Each night, scans one slot and compares later scans against this investigator's prior parity baseline.

mafia_framer.description: Mafia Framer. Marks one target so a same-night parity investigation reads scum.

mafia_vanilla_cop.description: Mafia Vanilla Cop. Each night, checks whether one slot is vanilla.

mafia_neapolitan.description: Mafia Neapolitan. Each night, checks whether one slot is Vanilla Town.

mafia_gunsmith.description: Mafia Gunsmith. Each night, checks whether one slot has a gun-bearing role.

mafia_role_cop.description: Mafia Role Cop. Each night, learns one target's role key.

mafia_full_cop.description: Mafia Full Cop. Each night, learns one target's role key and alignment.

mafia_watcher.description: Mafia Watcher. Each night, watches one slot and learns which visible actors visited that target.

mafia_voyeur.description: Mafia Voyeur. Each night, watches one slot and learns which visible action ids targeted that slot.

mafia_motion_detector.description: Mafia Motion Detector. Each night, checks whether one slot visibly acted or was visibly visited.

mafia_bus_driver.description: Mafia Bus Driver. Each night, swaps two slots so actions aimed at either land on the other.

mafia_redirector.description: Mafia Redirector. Each night, retargets actions aimed at the first submitted slot to the second submitted slot.

mafia_empowerer.description: Mafia Empowerer. Each night, empowers one target so their same-night actions ignore blocks and redirects.

mafia_rolestopper.description: Mafia Rolestopper. Each night, makes one other slot untargetable for the current resolution.

mafia_poisoner.description: Mafia Poisoner. Each night marks one slot as poisoned; unresolved poison kills on the next night unless cured.

mafia_poison_doctor.description: Mafia Poison Doctor. Each night cures one poisoned slot before pending poison death resolves.

mafia_healer.description: Mafia Healer. Mafia Universe alias of Poison Doctor: each night cures one poisoned slot before pending poison death resolves.

mafia_arsonist.description: Mafia Arsonist. Douses slots with a persistent mark, then ignites all slots doused before the current resolution.

mafia_firefighter.description: Mafia Firefighter. Each night extinguishes one doused slot before ignite reads carried douse marks.

mafia_motivator.description: Mafia Motivator. Each night grants one target a private single-use extra action.

mafia_fruit_vendor.description: Mafia Fruit Vendor. Each night sends fruit as a private target notification with no persistent mechanical effect.

mafia_night_desperado.description: Mafia Night Desperado. Each night may attempt an ordinary non-factional kill; same-alignment targets trigger a self-kill failback.

mafia_vigilante.description: Mafia Vigilante. Each night may perform an ordinary non-factional kill.

mafia_janitor.description: Mafia Janitor. Each night may perform an ordinary non-factional kill whose death flip is concealed by the pack death_reveal policy.

mafia_universal_backup.description: Mafia Universal Backup. Chooses one source target and inherits that target's role if the source later dies.

mafia_day_vigilante.description: Mafia Day Vigilante. Each day may perform an ordinary non-factional kill before the vote outcome is resolved.

mafia_day_desperado.description: Mafia Day Desperado. Each day may shoot one target before the vote outcome; a non-town target causes the Desperado to die instead.

mafia_ninja.description: Mafia Ninja. Each night may perform an ordinary non-factional kill hidden from graph-derived visit results.

serial_killer.description: Mafia Universe Serial Killer. Independent killer with an ordinary protectable night kill.

mafia_power_role_killer.description: Mafia Power Role Killer. Each night may kill only a target whose role is outside the pack's vanilla role set.

mafia_inventor.description: Mafia Inventor. Each night chooses one private item to grant to a target.

mafia_ita_evasive.description: Mafia-aligned target with percent ITA hit-chance reduction.

mafia_ita_shielded.description: Mafia-aligned target with one ITA shield.

mafia_ita_evasive_shielded.description: Mafia-aligned target that composes percent ITA vulnerability with one ITA shield.

precedence.notes: A Block prevents the target slot's first matching roleblockable night action from resolving.
Redirect actions rewrite target maps before kill/protect/investigation actions read targets.
Protection saves against ordinary kills; Strongman bypasses this protection.
A Kill removes the target unless the actor is blocked or the target is protected.
